concept: Industrial dream plain merging portrait figures with Pink Floyd collage symbols
scene: In a surreal industrial dreamscape carved as a linocut, a short-haired adult woman in a sleeveless halter stands at the front of a ruined power-station plain, not posed but striding through it as if guiding the viewer onward. Behind her, two adult companions emerge from carved haze: one with a small topknot, the other carrying an angular geometric frame that echoes the crystalline factory architecture rising from the ground around them. The station’s chimneys, railings, rubble heaps, and faceted structures interlock into one continuous environment, while a rainbow band reinterpreted as a bold striped pathway cuts through the scene and transforms into a jagged pulse line snaking across the land. Above, a cloud-textured circular sun and a swirling round moon balance the sky, with a small pig drifting between them like a carved weather vane. Farther back, pyramid silhouettes appear on the horizon, tying the industrial terrain to a distant desert edge. Everything is rendered in thick black gouged contours and solid fields with one accent blue ink, so the portraits, pig, pyramids, pulse stripe, and factory forms all read as one high-contrast woodblock world on warm paper.
prompt: Create one linocut print - bold hand-carved lines, chunky interlocking positive and negative shapes, ink rolled onto textured paper. The image is a 16:9 music blog header. Scene: In a surreal industrial dreamscape carved as a linocut, a short-haired adult woman in a sleeveless halter stands at the front of a ruined power-station plain, not posed but striding through it as if guiding the viewer onward. Behind her, two adult companions emerge from carved haze: one with a small topknot, the other carrying an angular geometric frame that echoes the crystalline factory architecture rising from the ground around them. The station’s chimneys, railings, rubble heaps, and faceted structures interlock into one continuous environment, while a rainbow band reinterpreted as a bold striped pathway cuts through the scene and transforms into a jagged pulse line snaking across the land. Above, a cloud-textured circular sun and a swirling round moon balance the sky, with a small pig drifting between them like a carved weather vane. Farther back, pyramid silhouettes appear on the horizon, tying the industrial terrain to a distant desert edge. Everything is rendered in thick black gouged contours and solid fields with one accent blue ink, so the portraits, pig, pyramids, pulse stripe, and factory forms all read as one high-contrast woodblock world on warm paper. Weave in recognisable elements taken from the 2 uploaded album covers: source 1: short-haired woman in a light halter top; source 2: two suited men shaking hands beside rainbow and industrial ruins. Transform the subjects, figures, creatures, objects, and symbols depicted in the uploaded covers so they stay recognisable, and place them all inside one cohesive world with a single shared setting and consistent light. Carve each album motif into the block - strong simplified forms built from gouged lines and solid areas of ink, each still recognisable. Composition: High-contrast interlocking shapes patterning the whole frame like a woodblock illustration. Colour direction: black, cyan-blue, warm off-white paper - one or two ink colours on warm paper - black plus a single accent colour from the sleeves. Mood: enigmatic, futuristic, and slightly melancholic. Keep the scene safe and tasteful: feature only adults (no children, infants, or minors), and show no gore, wounds, body horror, medical or anatomical imagery, blank or milky eyes, nudity, or sexual content. Reinterpret any such source motif abstractly, and suggest rather than exactly replicate the likeness of any identifiable real person. Do not include any text, letters, words, numbers, captions, titles, logos, watermarks, or signage anywhere in the image. Avoid: readable text, letters, words, numbers, captions, titles, logos, watermarks, signage, grid layout, contact sheet, evenly tiled squares, raw album-cover thumbnails, collage of separate panels, photorealistic photograph, DSLR photo, 3D render, CGI, octane render, glossy 3D rendering, camera depth of field, lens bokeh, realistic skin texture, a posed group of people arranged for the camera, objects displayed on tables, trays, or plinths, one giant central sculpture as the centrepiece of the scene. Bold, confident, gallery-quality print design with a strong sense of place.
restylePrompt: Restyle this image as a linocut print with bold hand-carved linework and solid ink on textured paper. Create one linocut print - bold hand-carved lines, chunky interlocking positive and negative shapes, ink rolled onto textured paper. Keep the existing composition, and keep every one of these motifs clearly recognisable: source 1: short-haired woman in a light halter top; source 2: two suited men shaking hands beside rainbow and industrial ruins. Keep the image safe and tasteful: no children or minors, no gore, nudity, or sexual content. Do not add any text, letters, words, numbers, captions, logos, watermarks, or signage.
